topic: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)

questions.hindi: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।
options: If only the weather were good.
If only I had more money.
I wish I had more money.
questions.answer: I wish I had more money.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा पैसे होते।" = "I wish I had more money."

questions.answer: had
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If only I had more money."

questions.answer: I wish I were there.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I wish I were there."

questions.hindi: काश मैंने पहले पढ़ाई की होती।
options: I wish I had more time.
I wish you would speak slowly.
I wish I had not made this mistake.
If only I had studied earlier.
questions.answer: If only I had studied earlier.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "काश मैंने पहले पढ़ाई की होती।" = "If only I had studied earlier."

questions.sentence: I wish I had _____ made this mistake.
questions.answer: not
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I wish I had not made this mistake."

questions.sentence: I wish you will calm down.
options: I wish you will calm down.
I wish you would calm down.
questions.answer: I wish you would calm down.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I wish you would calm down."

options: If only we could meet again.
I wish I had more money.
If only the weather were good.
questions.answer: I wish I could fly.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मुझे काश मैं उड़ सकता।" = "I wish I could fly."

questions.answer: weather
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If only the weather were good."

questions.sentence: I wish I has talked to him.
options: I wish I has talked to him.
I wish I had talked to him.
questions.answer: I wish I had talked to him.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I wish I had talked to him."

questions.hindi: काश मुझे यह पहले पता होता।
options: I wish I knew this language.
If only I had studied earlier.
I wish I had more time.
If only I had known this earlier.
questions.answer: If only I had known this earlier.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "काश मुझे यह पहले पता होता।" = "If only I had known this earlier."

questions.answer: had
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I wish I had more time."

questions.sentence: I wish you will listen to me.
options: I wish you will listen to me.
I wish you would listen to me.
questions.answer: I wish you would listen to me.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I wish you would listen to me."

questions.hindi: मुझे काश मैं यह decision न लेता।
options: If only we had not gone there.
If only we could meet again.
I wish I had not taken this decision.
questions.answer: I wish I had not taken this decision.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मुझे काश मैं यह decision न लेता।" = "I wish I had not taken this decision."

questions.answer: could
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If only we could meet again."

questions.sentence: I wish I worked harder yesterday.
options: I wish I worked harder yesterday.
questions.answer: I wish I worked harder.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I wish I worked harder."

questions.hindi: काश उसने मुझे माफ़ कर दिया होता।
options: If only I had known this earlier.
I wish I knew this language.
If only he had forgiven me.
questions.answer: If only he had forgiven me.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "काश उसने मुझे माफ़ कर दिया होता।" = "If only he had forgiven me."

questions.answer: knew
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "I wish I knew this language."

questions.sentence: I wish you will speak slowly.
options: I wish you will speak slowly.
I wish you would speak slowly.
questions.answer: I wish you would speak slowly.
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I wish you would speak slowly."

questions.hindi: मुझे काश मैंने वह मौका लिया होता।
options: I wish you would calm down.
I wish I had not taken this decision.
If only we had not gone there.
I wish I had taken that opportunity.
questions.answer: I wish I had taken that opportunity.
questions.explanation: Correct translation: "मुझे काश मैंने वह मौका लिया होता।" = "I wish I had taken that opportunity."

questions.sentence: If only we _____ not gone there.
questions.answer: had
questions.explanation: Full sentence: "If only we had not gone there."
